reference: Okay, here is my problem: I have been trying to have another baby, and on the third of July, I tried to conceive. However, today when I went to the bathroom, I noticed that I was bleeding, and my period does not usually come until the 19th of every month. So, my question is, what could be the reason for my bleeding if my period does not come until the 19th?
text: Okay, here is my problem. I have been trying to have another baby, and on the 3rd of July, I tried to conceive. However, today, when I went to the bathroom, I noticed that I was bleeding, and my period does not usually come until the 19th of every month. So, my question is, what could be the reason for my bleeding if my period does not come until the 19th?
